title: Re-run PRD gap analysis
description: Re-run PRD gap analysis against current codebase to update prd.json match score. PRD.md has been comprehensively rewritten with all implemented features documented. Since last scan (2026-04-07), multiple test coverage tasks completed (ls pagination, find -type, rm -r safety, cd-to-file, path resolution, mkdir error format, test coverage quality gate). Expected: PRD match should increase significantly from 75% toward 90%+. Update .team/gaps/prd.json with current status.
